# Discovery Phase Summary — 2026-06-29

**Status:** Discovery phase complete (15/15 tasks)
**Audience:** Opus / SPEC planning — read this first before first rebuild SPEC
**Generated by:** Cursor Agent session 2026-06-29

---

## Executive summary

Over fifteen bounded discovery tasks, agents mapped the live Rolliworks suite (RolliSuite, RolliWorking, RolliConnect, RolliTime contracts) against operator workflow captures from Michael and Vianna. The system is **operationally functional but architecturally fragmented**: possession, inventory, shop-floor location, photos, QBO sync, and client identity each live in partially overlapping data silos with recurring **silent failure** patterns (HTTP 200 while durable state is empty or wrong).

The three largest architectural shifts to emerge are: **(1) D-019 two-stage intake** — possession (Stage 1) must be auditable separately from verification and inventory commit (Stage 2); **(2) D-020** — silent failure is banned and Receive Watch becomes the source of truth for component creation, not estimate markers or RW intake hooks; **(3) chain-of-custody infrastructure (D-015)** — requires unified asset visibility (W-33), authoritative `station_id` with drag-and-drop GUI (W-37), and photo discipline across intake, inspection, RT dial library, and pickup before/after comparison (W-38).

Discovery did not implement fixes. It produced evidence, contracts, and prioritized rebuild entry points. Production patches captured separately (`PROD-FIX-001` qbo_sync_log drift). **10 open human questions** remain for the 2026-06-29 AM snapshot (+ 5 new from final tasks = **15 total** across discovery files).

---

## Key architectural findings

| Finding | Discovery | Decision / wishlist |
|---------|-----------|---------------------|
| Intake conflates possession and inventory commit | Q-001, Q-015 | **D-019** two-stage intake |
| Component registration at RW intake from estimate flow, not staff toggles | Q-011, Q-004 | **D-020** Receive Watch creates components |
| Estimate W/B/P/PM markers are suggestions only | Q-004, A-006 | Receive Watch backfills classification |
| Shop Floor broken when `job_components` empty/wrong | Q-004, Q-011 | D-020 + markerless fix |
| `station_id` NULL + heuristic dots | Q-004, Q-013 | **W-37** drag-and-drop GUI |
| No digital safe bin / WM bin model | Q-013 | W-33 visual inventory |
| QBO customer cron silently stuck since 2026-01-12 | Q-005, A-010 | D-020; push-on-fulfill canonical |
| `qbo_sync_log` schema drift (invoice type, finished_at) | Q-005, A-011 | **PROD-FIX-001** |
| Three photo silos (R2 inspection, Supabase intake, RT dial) | Q-009 | `shared.intake_photos`; W-38 |
| RW lossy status mapping to RS (9→2 statuses) | Q-002 | Rebuild status contract |
| RC duplicate clients + thread fragmentation | Q-003, Q-012 | Case-insensitive email; conversation reuse |
| RT integration intent-only — no live endpoints | Q-008 | Proposed JSON schemas per flow |
| Cross-app auth fragmented (separate Supabase projects) | Q-010 | Shared auth TBD |
| Pickup missing custody release + intake photos | Q-006, A-014/015 | D-015 hooks |
| 19 RS email functions; 2 missing; fire-and-forget QBO emails | Q-007 | `email_send_log` per D-020 |
| RW iPad = `/wm` only; Shop Floor drag mouse-only | Q-014 | W-37 touch + D-016 QR |
| Multi-estimate / no-estimate / spouse shipments unsupported | Q-015, A-001 | W-32, W-36, junction table |
| Paper 3-color carbon WOs not digitized | Q-013, A-009 | Out of scope |

---

## Cross-cutting patterns

### Silent failures (D-020)
Appeared in: Q-005 (QBO cron, sync_log INSERT), Q-007 (fire-and-forget Resend), Q-011 (silent RW push), Q-002 (undocumented status paths), inspection/estimate investigations (prior silos). **Rebuild rule:** every async path writes observable start/success/fail before returning 200.

### Two-stage workflows (D-019)
Appeared in: Q-001, Q-015 (intake), Q-009 (possession vs inspection photos), Q-013 (possession vs shop-floor location), Q-006 (pickup release). Stage 1 and Stage 2 are conflated in current schema.

### Photo fragmentation
Appeared in: Q-009, Q-001, Q-006, Q-008 §6, W-38. No unified index; pickup before/after blocked.

### Dual location models (RS asset vs RW component)
Appeared in: Q-013, Q-011, Q-004. No FK between `client_property` and `job_components`.

### Intent-only integration contracts
Appeared in: Q-008 (RT), Q-010 (auth), Q-002 (RW→RS status). Rebuild must nail payloads before Emergent cutover.

---

## Operational risks identified (production)

| Risk | Severity | Evidence |
|------|----------|----------|
| QBO customer sync cron non-functional 30+ days | High | Q-005, A-010, 162 stuck rows |
| Invoice sync zero telemetry | High | PROD-FIX-001 |
| Shop Floor unusable ~10% markerless jobs | High | Q-004, Q-011 |
| Chain of custody / safe contents unknown | High | Q-013, Michael workflow |
| `send-pickup-email` missing — pickup resend broken | Medium | Q-007 |
| RC duplicate clients + fragmented threads | Medium | Q-012 |
| Pickup without custody release | Medium | Q-006, A-015 |
| RW inspection photos inaccessible to techs | Medium | Q-009 |

## Rebuild priority recommendations (SPEC order)

| Priority | SPEC topic | Depends on | Risk addressed |
|----------|------------|------------|----------------|
| **P0** | Two-stage intake + component creation at Receive Watch | D-019, D-020 | Shop Floor, custody |
| **P0** | `shared` schema + cross-app auth | Q-010 | All integrations |
| **P0** | QBO sync rewrite (observable, chunked) | D-020, PROD-FIX-001 | Silent failures |
| **P1** | Shop Floor W-37 touch drag + authoritative `station_id` | Q-014, Q-004 | Floor ops |
| **P1** | `shared.intake_photos` + W-38 pickup comparison | Q-009, Q-006 | Mislabeling |
| **P1** | RC client matching + conversation reuse | Q-012 | Inbox fragmentation |
| **P1** | RT↔RS↔RW integration endpoints | Q-008 | RolliTime cutover |
| **P2** | Multi-estimate intake + household links | Q-015 | Edge workflows |
| **P2** | Email layer + RC reply routing | Q-007 | Vianna pain |
| **P2** | Visual asset inventory W-33 | Q-013 | Theft prevention |

## Bridge to SPEC phase

1. Read **NORTH-STAR.md** and **BUILD-PROCESS.md** for slice boundaries.
2. First SPEC should implement **D-019 + D-020** on intake (possession tables, Receive Watch component creation, observable RW push).
3. Run **PROD-FIX-001** in parallel on Lovable app (not blocked on rebuild).
4. Use **QUESTIONS-2026-06-29-am.docx** for human answers before locking schema names (`storage_slot` vs `station_id` safe bins, W-33 spine, RT table choice).
